## Summary

Describe why this issue exists.

## Sprint

Sprint vX.Y

## Outcome

Describe the concrete result expected when this issue is complete.

## Parent

Parent epic: #<issue-number>

This issue must also be added as a GitHub native sub-issue of the parent epic when supported.

## Scope

- Work item 1
- Work item 2

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] Criterion 1
- [ ] Criterion 2
- [ ] Validation method is documented.

## Notes

Add implementation notes, constraints, review links, or affected files.
